output: Phase 1 validation is complete on the automated side and paused where the plan requires. The scoped Phase 1 vitest run passed, a throwaway jsdom repro confirmed the LoRA close-path no longer blocks textarea typing or model-select opening, the repro test file was deleted immediately after it passed, and I did not begin Phase 2 because manual user confirmation is still pending.
commands_run: npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/domains/media-lightbox src/domains/lora src/shared/components/PhaseConfigSelectorModal
deviations: `npm test` did not pass repo-wide. It finished with 19 failing files and 36 failing tests outside this batch, including import-resolution failures in `src/moduleImportCoverage.test.ts`, `src/shared/editMedia/navigation.test.ts`, `src/shared/components/__tests__/HoverScrubVideo.test.tsx`, `src/shared/components/__tests__/LineageGifModal.test.tsx`, `src/shared/components/ui/touchableTooltip.test.tsx`, `src/shared/hooks/__tests__/useResources.test.ts`, `src/shared/hooks/projects/services/projectSetupRepository.test.ts`, and `src/shared/hooks/projects/services/projectSetupService.test.ts`, plus unrelated expectation mismatches in areas like `PanesContext`, `AppProviders`, `AgentChat`, `TasksPaneController`, `GenerationTokenPanel`, and `TimelineTrackPrelude`.
Manual user confirmation has not happened yet, so SC5 is only partially satisfied and Phase 2 remains intentionally paused.

task_updates.executor_notes: Confirmed the intended runner from `package.json` (`vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts`). The requested Phase 1 scopes passed together: `src/domains/media-lightbox`, `src/domains/lora`, and `src/shared/components/PhaseConfigSelectorModal` finished green with 58/58 files and 272/272 tests. I also created a short throwaway jsdom repro around the real `LoraSelectorModal` plus the shared `Textarea` and `Select`; it passed, proving that after closing the LoRA modal the textarea still accepts typing and the model select opens normally. That temporary test file was deleted immediately after the run. As an additional repo-wide check, `npm test` completed with unrelated failures outside this batch (19 failed files / 36 failed tests), so I stopped here and did not begin Phase 2 pending user confirmation.
commands_run: npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/domains/media-lightbox src/domains/lora src/shared/components/PhaseConfigSelectorModal

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Automated validation passed for the requested Phase 1 scopes, and the temporary repro confirmed the close-path bug is fixed: after closing the real LoRA modal, the shared edit textarea remained typeable and the shared model select opened normally. Manual user confirmation has not happened yet, so Phase 2 is still paused.
